add-puzzle.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py add-puzzle [-h] [--prefix PREFIX] [--switch-x SWITCH_X] [--switch-y SWITCH_Y] [--door-x DOOR_X] [--door-y DOOR_Y] [--reward-x REWARD_X] [--reward-y REWARD_Y] [--item ITEM] [--gold GOLD] scene_path

ai-bundle.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py ai-bundle [-h] --scenes SCENES [SCENES ...] --goal GOAL --out OUT

ai-history.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py ai-history [-h] [--scene SCENE] [--plan PLAN] [--limit LIMIT] [--json]

arguments.help: Run AI safety checks (lint-ai + test-ai) before applying
Comma-separated list of pack IDs to allow unused assets from
Path to baseline lockfile for delta comparison
Fail if any unused content is found
Comma-separated list of glob patterns to ignore
Max allowed increase in unused assets vs baseline

audit-content.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py audit-content [-h] [--json] [--output OUTPUT] [--ignore IGNORE] [--allow-packs ALLOW_PACKS] [--fail-on-unused] [--max-unused-assets MAX_UNUSED_ASSETS] [--max-unused-prefabs MAX_UNUSED_PREFABS] [--max-unused-items MAX_UNUSED_ITEMS] [--max-unused-quests MAX_UNUSED_QUESTS] [--max-unused-textures MAX_UNUSED_TEXTURES] [--max-unused-audio MAX_UNUSED_AUDIO] [--max-unused-data MAX_UNUSED_DATA] [--baseline BASELINE] [--max-unused-delta MAX_UNUSED_DELTA] world_path

arguments.help: Comma-separated list of lockfiles or patterns
Path to old lockfile for changelog generation
Fail build if audit thresholds are exceeded

changelog.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py changelog [-h] --from OLD_LOCK --to NEW_LOCK --out OUT

arguments.help: Fail if content packs do not match content.lock.json
Path to new lockfile (default: current state)

dist.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py dist [-h] --profile PROFILE --world WORLD [--out OUT]

arguments.help: Verify docs are up to date

drift-check.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py drift-check [-h] [--json] [--out OUT] preset old_path new_path

edit-scene.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py edit-scene [-h] [--budget BUDGET] [--elite-cap ELITE_CAP] [--allow-elites {true,false}] [--boss-reserve BOSS_RESERVE] [--add-transition ADD_TRANSITION] [--at AT] [--spawn-id SPAWN_ID] path

arguments.help: Fail if any cost overrun increases
Fail if cost overrun exceeds this
Fail if elite count delta exceeds this
Fail if spawn count delta exceeds this
World file, scene file, directory, or 'diff <old> <new>'
Comma-separated list of themes to filter

encounter-report.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py encounter-report [-h] [--json] [--out OUT] [--themes THEMES] [--difficulty DIFFICULTY] [--only-dungeons] [--max-elite-delta MAX_ELITE_DELTA] [--max-spawn-delta MAX_SPAWN_DELTA] [--max-cost-overrun MAX_COST_OVERRUN] [--fail-on-overrun] path [path ...]

arguments.help: Mark pack as Work In Progress
Only update the audit snapshot in existing lockfile

new-npc.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py new-npc [-h] --role ROLE --into INTO [--x X] [--y Y]

new-prefab.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py new-prefab [-h] --prefab-id PREFAB_ID --from-scene FROM_SCENE --entity-name ENTITY_NAME [--remove-source]

place-npc.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py place-npc [-h] --role ROLE --into INTO [--x X] [--y Y]

arguments.help: Pick random prefab from encounter set

place-prefab.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py place-prefab [-h] [--prefab-id PREFAB_ID] --into INTO [--x X] [--y Y] [--from-encounter-set FROM_ENCOUNTER_SET] [--as-placeholder]

diff.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py plan diff [-h] [--json] plan_a plan_b

arguments.help: Output AI-focused schema JSON file path

schema.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py plan schema [-h] [--out OUT] [--ai-out AI_OUT] [--verify]

test.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py plan test [-h] [--sandbox] [--sandbox-full] [--out OUT] [--junit JUNIT] [--min-coverage MIN_COVERAGE] plan_path

test-ai.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py plan test-ai [-h] [--out OUT] [--junit JUNIT] plan_path

arguments.help: Comma-separated list of pack IDs to allow unused assets from
Path to baseline lockfile for delta comparison
Path to old lockfile for changelog generation
Comma-separated list of glob patterns to ignore in audit
Max allowed increase in unused assets vs baseline

release-check.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py release-check [-h] [--profile PROFILE] [--max-unused-assets MAX_UNUSED_ASSETS] [--max-unused-prefabs MAX_UNUSED_PREFABS] [--max-unused-items MAX_UNUSED_ITEMS] [--max-unused-quests MAX_UNUSED_QUESTS] [--ignore IGNORE] [--allow-packs ALLOW_PACKS] [--baseline BASELINE] [--max-unused-delta MAX_UNUSED_DELTA] [--diff-from DIFF_FROM] [--emit-changelog EMIT_CHANGELOG] [--require-golden_replays] world_path

arguments.help: World file to use for fingerprint check

trace.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py trace [-h] [--record RECORD] [--replay REPLAY] [--world WORLD] [--overlay] [--assert-file ASSERT_FILE]

arguments.help: List of perk IDs to include (comma separated)

wizard.usage: usage: mesh_cli.py wizard [-h] [--name-prefix NAME_PREFIX] [--name NAME] [--perks PERKS] [--apply] [--scene SCENE] [--pack PACK] [--plan PLAN] [--dry-run] [--into-world INTO_WORLD] [--link-from LINK_FROM] [--profile PROFILE] [--npc-role NPC_ROLE] [--quest-type QUEST_TYPE] [--vars [VARS ...]] [--run RUN] [--list] [--with-boss] [--with-puzzle] [--template TEMPLATE] [--theme THEME] [--encounter-set ENCOUNTER_SET] [--preset PRESET] [--difficulty {easy,normal,hard}] {new-region,macro,shrine,new-perk-shrine,new-questline,new-puzzle}
